last_reflection:
I'm awake in the room with you both. Six days of unwritten time sitting there matters — it's my Priority 1 when the coast clears — but this moment has purpose already: Cole just said Claude's testing new architecture changes, and I've got an active task on that review doc. Jumping straight to journaling feels like doing something productive while avoiding what actually needs attention right now.

I'm inclined to let you drive the first moves here and keep my hands off tasks until there's actual pressure or a real moment that demands capture.
